prompt.prompt:
One-to-One: *Computer Science Basics*

Match each term to its primary definition.
rightColumn: A data type with two possible values

Boolean: A data type with two possible values

questions.context: In a one-to-one relationship, every item in the left column has exactly one unique partner in the right column.

prompt.prompt:
Many-to-One: Data Types

Match the specific values to their general Data Type category.

questions.context: This is many-to-one because multiple items on the left (42 and 3.14) both map to a single category on the right (Number).

prompt.prompt:
One-to-Many: Pyret Capabilities

Which features are associated with these Pyret functions? (Some functions may have multiple features).

questions.context: In one-to-many, a single item (like `rectangle`) requires multiple matches to be fully described.
